terraform_log.title: Terraform
terraform_log.description: Terraform TF_LOG and CLI apply/plan lines

cli.pattern: ^(?<body>(?:Terraform (?:used|has been successfully initialized|will perform the following actions)|Apply complete! Resources: \d+ added, \d+ changed, \d+ destroyed\.|Plan: \d+ to add, \d+ to change, \d+ to destroy\.|Error: .*))$

sample.line: Apply complete! Resources: 1 added, 0 changed, 0 destroyed.
